text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear strange, possibly spiritual<n>invocations
coming from inside the<n>waiting room. I take a peek
inside to<n>find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Glory beee! Glory beee! Glory be...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whew. I got so excited, I might havegotten way more into that chantthan usual!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm going to make use<n>of all of my
motivation, courage, and<n>luck in this race!
